```python
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        prev_bit = n & 1
        n >>= 1
        while n:
            curr_bit = n & 1
            if curr_bit == prev_bit:
                return False
            prev_bit = curr_bit
            n >>= 1
        return True
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through the bits of the given number, checking if any two adjacent bits are the same. It uses bitwise operations to achieve this efficiently.
